release.action:
Features:
  • Added dedicated embedding provider abstraction with support for separate embedding model configuration.
  • Enhanced readLine method to support multi-line input with line breaker and user signature.
  • Added instructions and model parameter handling in ActMojo.
  • Added EmbeddingProvider type validation before instantiation in GenaiProviderManager.
  • Added fallback to System.out.print for null console and model logging in Ghostwriter.
  • Added null checks to prevent overwriting instructions and model properties in ActProcessor.
Fixes:
  • Fixed variable naming issues in multiple components.
  • Fixed classification JSON detection in Picker and updated embedding model provider prefix in assembly act.
  • Fixed missing return statement in embedding method of CodeMieProvider.
  • Fixed rclone command syntax in site.toml to use backticks for Windows compatibility.
  • Fixed unchecked cast warning in ProjectContextFunctionTools.
Refactoring:
  • Refactored embedding support across OpenAI and CodeMie providers.
  • Refactored CodeMieProvider to use named inner classes for provider extensions.
  • Refactored provider initialization to pass model name as explicit parameter instead of through configuration.
  • Refactored bindex act to use multi-step inputs with dedicated javadoc generation.
  • Refactored maven-javadoc-plugin configuration from reporting to pluginManagement section.
  • Removed unused listFilesRecursively method from file utilities.
  • Removed unused imports from CodeMieProvider and BindexFunctionTools.
  • Removed unused dependencies from pom.xml.
  • Removed extra definitions in pom.xml.
  • Removed schema function tool in favor of dedicated embedding provider.
Chores:
  • Added dependencies for HTML parsing and text processing utilities.

Features:
  • Added MCP server support, including multi-server definitions and related integration helpers.
  • Added web search integration through the new WebSearch tool and helper methods for web search and MCP server registration.
  • Added new functional tools for applying file patches, searching command logs, and reading previous command log chunks.
  • Expanded CodeMie provider support to include the gemini- model family and enabled broader model processing support.
Fixes:
  • Fixed act prompt processing and string property inheritance behavior.
  • Fixed class functional tool initialization and corrected log message behavior.
  • Adjusted default exit code handling and improved command-line tool documentation.
  • Updated final instructions and exclusion handling, including support for additional excluded directories such as .machai.
Refactoring:
  • Renamed ProcessTerminationException to TaskTerminationException.
  • Improved internal file discovery by using project layout directory scanning utilities in recursive file operations.
  • Performed cleanup and javadoc improvements across provider and tooling code.
Documentation:
  • Updated javadocs, act files, release notes, and related documentation.
Chores:
  • Added and updated tests, addressed sonar issues, and updated the configured GW model.
  • Prepared the 1.1.8 release version update.

Fixes:
  • Improved task termination handling across Ghostwriter processors and Maven plugin execution.
  • Corrected the end-task exception class naming for clearer task completion semantics.
  • Fixed an incorrect log message in command function tools.

Features:
  • Added project context functional tools for pushing and popping project-scoped values.
Refactoring:
  • Extracted project context tooling from act-specific tooling and simplified internal tool loading.
  • Improved commit handling, interactive exit flow, picker tool loading, and constant organization.

Features:
  • Added the perform_act function tool to trigger predefined act workflows.
  • Added support for the >>> file include marker to include content from URLs or file paths during processing.
Fixes:
  • Fixed act episode processing for multi-threaded execution.

Features:
  • Added support for moving to an episode by name.
Fixes:
  • Improved move_to_episode handling.
  • Corrected an internal variable name.
  • Added a warning for cases where interactive mode is not supported.

Features:
  • Added Claude provider support, including provider configuration routing, tool call handling, message structure updates, Beta API integration, and web search support.
  • Expanded CodeMie provider model routing and removed the None provider.
  • Improved provider resolution and functional tool integration.
Fixes:
  • Fixed cache input token calculation in the Claude provider.
  • Fixed module processing logging level handling and act execution property handling.
  • Corrected <developers> information in POM files.
Refactoring:
  • Refactored function call handling shared by Claude and OpenAI providers.
  • Refactored provider shared base implementations and moved AbstractAIProvider into the provider package.
  • Refactored usage tracking and Maven plugin usage statistics logging to per-model statistics management.
  • Refactored episode execution from 0-based to 1-based indexing for clearer episode handling.
  • Refactored MCP server and web search configuration loops into shared provider logic.
